positive: A stylized, high-contrast line art illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, stylized sunset sky. The composition should be centered, featuring sharp, clean lines and minimal detail within the foreground elements (mountains, trees). Use a limited, complementary color palette: deep indigo for the mountains and varying shades of orange, magenta, and gold for the sky. Incorporate delicate stipple or abstract dot work patterns within the negative space of the sky to add texture and depth. The style should mimic sophisticated modern graphic design, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Isolated, vector-art quality, perfect silhouette.
negative: blur, low detail, watermark, text, signature, noise, grain, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, sloppy, photographic, gradient fade, ugly, grayscale
